title: Grief And The Sleeve
content:
Tears in the moonlight,
    You know why,
    Have marred the flowers
    On my rose sleeve.
    Ask why.

    From the Japanese of Hide-Yoshi.
meaning:
"Grief And The Sleeve" is a quintessential example of Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator)'s signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
